title: Do you think we will get another earthquake? (after 3 times)

content: I don't want to die eyebrowless but the decision has been done and I'm just praying I survive until my eyebrows grow back, so let me live for another month plz. And i hope the bug bites (not necessarily mosquito bites) will be healed by then cuz I don't want to look like I fucking have syphilis on my legs when I die.
